column1: Six months from now I'll be at university________I decide to take a year off first.
We'd better leave early tomorrow__________there's a lot of traffic when we get to Doncaster.
You can watch the film _________you promise to go straight to bed when it finished.
Let's go to Mirabella's tonight____________you haven't been there before.
____________I've still got my health, I don't mind how poor I am!
You'd better take a sweater with you________it gets cold tonight.
Do what you like_________you don't make any noise.
I'm not going to worry__________she hasn't called by midnight.
